title: ITC Hotels is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: ITC Hotels is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ITC Hotels is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!
